Heroes.explain: One of the founding members of Overwatch, Ana uses her skills and expertise to defend her home and the people she cares for.
The star graduate of Wuxing University's Fire College, Anran is always burning to push her limits.
Ashe is the ambitious and calculating leader of the Deadlock Rebels Gang and a respected figure in the criminal underworld.
An elite combat medic and ex-Talon operative, Baptiste now uses his skills to help those whose lives have been impacted by war.
Once a frontline combatant in the devastating Omnic Crisis, this curious Bastion unit now explores the world, fascinated by nature but wary of a fearful humanity.
No longer sitting on the sidelines, Brigitte Lindholm has taken up arms to defend those in need of protection.
Armed with his Peacekeeper revolver, the outlaw Cole Cassidy doles out justice on his own terms.
D.Va is a former professional gamer who now uses her skills to pilot a state-of-the-art mech in defense of her homeland.
As Vishkar Corporation’s most prized negotiator, Domina uses her masterful command of hard-light to take control of every situation.
Doomfist was the calculating leader of Talon, a terrorist organization and paramilitary force that works in direct opposition to Overwatch.
Echo is a multirole, adaptive robot with the most sophisticated artificial intelligence in the world, originally designed by Dr. Mina Liao for use during combat missions with Overwatch.
Emre disappeared after a lauded tenure on the Overwatch strike team. He has resurfaced years later, his body and mind manipulated by something unknown.
A search and rescue operative turned bounty hunter, Freja can find anyone for the right price.
The cyborg ninja Genji Shimada has made peace with the augmented body he once rejected, and in doing so, he has discovered a higher humanity.
Mastering his skills as a bowman and an assassin, Hanzo Shimada strives to prove himself as a warrior without peer.
A radical disruptor and an unstoppable weapon, Hazard has rocketed to fame in the criminal underworld as he fights to tear the system down.
As the last of the Inti Warriors, Illari is a vessel for the power of the sun. She’ll do anything to make up for her past.
A fearless feline pilot equipped with Brigitte’s latest jet-propulsion invention, Jetpack Cat brings adorable aerial support to the battlefield.
Armed with her axe, Carnage, and her electromagnetic gauntlet, the cutthroat leader of the Junkers is on a mission to rule the world.
Junkrat is an explosives-obsessed demolitionist who lives to cause chaos and destruction.
The first human born on Mars, Juno uses her space-age technology to solve any problem that enters her orbit. She is determined to one day save her home planet.
As Miko of the Kanezaka shrine and daughter of the Shimada's former swordmaster, Kiriko Kamori channels both her spiritual and ninja skills to heal her fractured city.
The brilliant creator of biolight, a technology that merges plant matter and hard light. He dreams of healing the world.
Lúcio is an international celebrity who inspires social change through his music and activism.
A charismatic and cunning Samoan warrior, Mauga thrives in the chaos of the battlefield and lives every day like it’s his last.
Mei is a scientist who has taken the fight to preserve the environment into her own hands.
A guardian angel to those who come under her care, Dr. Angela Ziegler is a peerless healer, a brilliant scientist, and a staunch advocate for peace.
Born under a shadow of misfortune, Mizuki will do anything it takes to break free of his curse and decide his own fate.
Equal parts brilliant and controversial, scientist Moira O'Deorain is on the cutting edge of genetic engineering, searching for a way to rewrite the fundamental building blocks of life.
Built from parts of one of Numbani's short-lived OR15 defense robots, Orisa is the city's newest protector, though she still has much to learn.
Fareeha Amari's commitment to duty runs in her blood. She comes from a long line of highly decorated soldiers and burns with the desire to serve with honor.
The brutal leader of Null Sector will stop at nothing to see his vision for the world realized.
Some speak of a black-robed terrorist known only as the Reaper. His identity and motives are a mystery. What is known is that where he appears, death follows.
Reinhardt Wilhelm styles himself as a champion of a bygone age, who lives by the knightly codes of valor, justice, and courage.
Roadhog is a powerful enforcer with a well-earned reputation for random and wanton destruction.
Brilliant astrophysicist Dr. Siebren de Kuiper's life changed forever when an experiment gone wrong gave him the ability to control gravity; now, Talon manipulates him to their own ends.
As a leader in the bygone days of Overwatch, Vivian Chase, callsign Sojourn, is determined to ensure its new heroes don’t repeat the mistakes of the past.
One of the world's most notorious hackers, Sombra uses information to manipulate those in power.
Symmetra literally bends reality. By manipulating hard-light constructs, she crafts the world as she wishes it to be, in hopes of engineering a perfect society.
At its height, Overwatch possessed one of the most advanced armaments on the planet, which could be traced to the workshop of an ingenious engineer named Torbjörn Lindholm.
The former Overwatch agent known as Tracer is a time-jumping adventurer and an irrepressible force for good.

As champion of the Colosseo and a member of Italy's elite, Vendetta will stop at nothing to reclaim the throne of her family's criminal empire. Known for her explosive rage and ruthlessness in battle, the only thing that exceeds her skill in physical combat is her boundless ambition.
A globe-trotting archaeologist and explorer, Venture has a passion for solving history’s mysteries.
Widowmaker is the perfect assassin: a patient, ruthlessly efficient killer who shows neither emotion nor remorse.
A super-intelligent, genetically engineered gorilla, Winston is a brilliant scientist and a champion for humanity’s potential.
A resourceful and highly intelligent mechanic and fighter, Wrecking Ball rose from the laboratories of Horizon Lunar Colony to become the Junker Queen’s champion.
Wielder of healing technology from Wuxing University’s Water College, Wuyang is always ready to turn the tide of battle.
Aleksandra Zaryanova is one of the world's strongest women, a celebrated athlete who sacrificed personal glory to protect her family, friends, and country in a time of war.
Zenyatta is an omnic monk who wanders the world in search of spiritual enlightenment. It is said that those who cross his path are never the same again.

Maps.explain: Aatlis is a Flashpoint map in Overwatch.
Antartic Peninsula is a Control map in Overwatch.
Blizzard World is a Hybrid map in Overwatch.
Busan is a Control map in Overwatch.
Circuit Royal is an Escort map in Overwatch.
Colosseo is a Push map in Overwatch.
Dorado is an Escort map in Overwatch.
Eichenwalde is a Hybrid map in Overwatch.
Esperanca is a Push map in Overwatch.
Hanamura is an Assault map in Overwatch.
Hanaoka is a Clash map in Overwatch.
Havana is an Escort map in Overwatch.
Hollywood is a Hybrid map in Overwatch.
Horizon Lunar Colony is an Assault map in Overwatch.
Ilios is a Control map in Overwatch.
Junkertown is an Escort map in Overwatch.
King's Row is a Hybrid map in Overwatch.
Lijiang Tower is a Control map in Overwatch.
Midtown is a Hybrid map in Overwatch.
Nepal is a Control map in Overwatch.
New Junk City is a Flashpoint map in Overwatch.
New Queen Street is a Push map in Overwatch.
Numbani is a Hybrid map in Overwatch.
OASIS is a Control map in Overwatch.
Paraiso is a Hybrid map in Overwatch.
Paris is an Assault map in Overwatch.
Rialto is a Escort map in Overwatch.
Runasapi is a Push map in Overwatch.
Samoa is a Control map in Overwatch.
Shambali Monastery is a Escort map in Overwatch.
Suravasa is a Flashpoint map in Overwatch.
Temple of Anubis is an Assault map in Overwatch.
Throne of Anubis is a Clash map in Overwatch.
Volskaya Industries is an Assault map in Overwatch.
Watchpoint Gibraltar is an Escort map in Overwatch.

Abilities.explain: [D.Va] Block projectiles in an area in front of you.
[D.Va] Fly in the direction you are facing.
[D.Va] Launch a volley of explosive rockets.
[Domina] Construct a segmented barrier.
[Domina] Push enemies back, stunning them if they hit a wall.
[Domina] Project an explosive crystal and reactivate to detonate it.
[Doomfist] Hold to charge then release to launch forward and knock an enemy back. Damage increases if the enemy hits a wall.
[Doomfist] Leap forward and smash the ground.
[Doomfist] Protect yourself from frontal attacks. Blocking heavy damage empowers Rocket Punch.
[Hazard] Protect yourself from frontal damage. Firing homing spikes at nearby enemies and regenerating ammo.
[Hazard] Lunge forward. Activate again to slash enemies, knocking them back.
[Hazard] Launch a spiked wall that damages and knocks back nearby enemies.
[Junker Queen] Active: Throw the blade. Re-activate to pull it back with any impaled enemy. Passive: Wound enemies hit by Quick Melee or Throw, dealing damage over time.
[Junker Queen] Grants temporary health and movement speed to yourself and allies.
[Junker Queen] Wound all enemies in front of you, dealing damage over time and reducing the cooldown for each enemy hit.
[Mauga] Charge forward to stomp and launch enemies. You are unstoppable while charging.
[Mauga] Gain damage reduction and nearby allies heal themselves by dealing damage.
[Orisa] Launch your javelin at an enemy to stun and knock them back. More effective if the enemy hits a wall.
[Orisa] Gain temporary health, reducing all damage taken and becoming unstoppable.
[Orisa] Spin your javelin to destroy projectiles and block melee attacks, while also pushing enemies and increasing forward speed.
[Ramattra] Create a barrier at the targeted location.
[Ramattra] Transform into Nemesis Form, changing your attacks and gaining bonus armor.
[Ramattra] Significantly reduces damage taken from the front and reduces movement speed.
[Ramattra] Fire a sphere of energy that creates a slowing vortex on the ground, damaging enemies within and pulling them downward.
[Reinhardt] Hold Secondary Fire to deploy a frontal energy barrier.
[Reinhardt] Charge forward and smash an enemy against a wall.
[Reinhardt] Launch a fiery projectile.
[Roadhog] Drag a targeted enemy to you.
[Roadhog] Heal yourself and reduce damage taken.
[Sigma] Hold to propel a floating barrier; release to stop. Press again to recall the barrier to you.
[Sigma] Absorb projectiles in front of you and convert them into extra health.
[Sigma] Gather a mass of debris and throw it at an enemy to knock them down.
[Winston] Leap forward into the air. Landing on an enemy damages them.
[Winston] Deploy a protective energy dome.
[Wrecking Ball] Launch a grappling claw to rapidly swing around the area. Enables high speed collisions to damage and knockback enemies.
[Wrecking Ball] Transform into a ball and increase maximum movement speed.
[Wrecking Ball] Create temporary extra health that increase with more nearby enemies. Some of the health can be transferred to allies.
[Wrecking Ball] Slam into the ground below to damage and launch enemies upward.
[Zarya] Create a damage barrier around you.
[Zarya] Create a damage barrier around an ally.
[Anran] Propel yourself forward and damage enemies you impact.
[Anran] Strike nearby enemies while dodging all damage.
[Ashe] Blast enemies in front of you and knock yourself backwards.
[Ashe] Throw an explosive that detonates after a short delay or immediately when shot.
[Bastion] Fire a bomb that bounces off walls and explodes when it hits enemies or the ground.
[Bastion] Switch between weapon configurations.
[Cassidy] Roll in the direction you're moving to take reduced damage and reload.
[Cassidy] Hinder enemies in front of you, slowing them and preventing them from using movement abilities.
[Echo] Fire a volley of sticky bombs that detonate after a delay.
[Flight] Fly forward quickly and then free-fly briefly.
[Echo] Channel a beam for a few seconds. Deals very high damage to targets under half health.
[Emre] Temporarily wield a semi-automatic pistol with lifestealing explosive rounds. Move faster and jump higher while wielded.
[Emre] Throw a grenade that detonates shortly after bouncing.
[Freja] Vault in the direction you're moving and refresh Take Aim.
[Freja] Launch upward with a gust of wind.
[Genji] Rapidly dash forward and inflict damage on enemies. Eliminations reset the cooldown.
[Genji] Deflect incoming projectiles towards the direction you are aiming and block melee attacks.
[Hanzo] Reveals enemies for a short time upon impact.
[Hanzo] The next 5 arrows ricochet and fire instantly at reduced damage.
[Hanzo] Double Jump.
[Junkrat] Throw a knockback mine with LSHIFT then detonate it with Secondary Fire
[Junkrat] Place an immobilizing trap.
[Mei] Become invulnerable and heal yourself.
[Mei] Create a wall in front of you.
[Pharah] Boost horizontally.
[Pharah] Fly rapidly upwards. Grants some fuel.
[Pharah] Launch an explosive blast to knock back enemies.
[Reaper] Move faster and become invulnerable, but you cannot shoot.
[Reaper] Teleport to a targeted location.
[Sojourn]High impact shot that consumes stored energy and pierces enemies.
Ground slide that can cancel into a high jump.
[Sojourn] Launch an energy burst that deals damage to enemies within it.
[Soldier: 76] Launch a volley of explosive rockets.
[Soldier: 76] Run faster while moving forward.
[Soldier: 76] Deploy a field that heals you and your allies.
[Sombra] Hold to hack. Hacked enemies cannot use abilities and can be seen through walls. Hacked health packs spawn faster and can't be used by enemies. Taking damage interrupts the hack attempt.
[Sombra] Infect enemies with a projectile that deals damage over time. Virus damages hacked targets at a faster rate.
[Sombra] Throw a beacon and teleport to it. Become stealthed for a short duration after teleporting.
[Symmetra] Deploy a small turret that damages and slows enemies.
[Symmetra] Create two temporary teleporters that enable instance travel between them.
[Torbjorn] Deploy a self-building turret.
[Torbjorn] Gain additional extra health as well as improved attack, movement, and reload speed.
[Tracer] Teleport in the direction you are moving.
[Tracer] Travel back in time to your previous location and health.
[Vendetta] Block with your sword, reducing frontal damage and deflecting melee attacks. Blocking damage depletes energy.
[Vendetta] Hurl your sword in the direction you are facing and then fly to it.
[Vendetta] Available when Warding Stance is active. Consume energy to fire a wide projectile.
[Vendetta] Rush forward into a circular slash.
[Venture] Dash forward while above or underground, pushing enemies back. The cooldown is accelerated while underground.
[Venture] Move underground and become invulnerable. Emerge to deal damage.
[Widowmaker] Launch a hook that pulls you towards a ledge.
[Widowmaker] Launch a poison trap.
[Ana] Fires a dart that puts an enemy to sleep.
[Ana] Throws a grenade that heals and increases healing on allies, while damaging and preventing healing on enemies.
[Baptiste] Activate to heal yourself and nearby allies instantly, with additional healing over time. Instant heal is doubled for targets less than half health.
[Baptiste] Toss a device that prevents allies from dying. The device can be destroyed.
[Brigitte] Hold Secondary Fire to deploy a frontal energy barrier.
[Brigitte] Available when Barrier Shield is deployed. Dash forward to knock back an enemy.
[Brigitte] Launch your flail forward to knock an enemy away from you.
[Brigitte] Heals an ally for a short duration.
[Illari] Launches you in the direction you are moving. Knocking back enemies. Hold jump to go higher.
[Illari] Deploy a pylon that heals allies.
[Jetpack Cat] Accelerate in your movement direction. Fuel recovery is slower while carrying another player.
[Jetpack Cat] Toggle into transport mode, allowing an ally to be towed. Increases movement speed and heals your ally.
[Jetpack Cat] Pulsing area heal that increases in frequency over time. Knockback nearby enemies when activated.
[Juno] Press Secondary Fire to lock on, then Primary Fire to fire homing projectiles. Heals allies over time and damages enemies.
[Juno] Glide horizontally with increased movement speed.
[Juno] Deploy a ring that increases movement speed of allies that pass through it.
[Kiriko] Teleport directly to an ally.
[Kiriko] Throw a protective charm to make allies become briefly invulnerable and cleansed of most negative effects.
[Lifeweaver] Throw a platform that springs upwards when stepped on. Resets when not in use.
[Lifeweaver] Dash towards your traveling direction and lightly heal yourself.
[Lifeweaver] Pull an ally to your location, protecting them as they travel.
[Lucio] Create a short-range blast wave to knock enemies away from you.
[Lucio] Switches between two songs: Healing Boost heals nearby allies, and Speed Boost makes nearby allies move faster.
[Lucio] Increase the effectiveness of your current song.
[Mercy] Fly towards an ally. While in flight, Jump launches you forward, and and Crouch launches you upward.
[Mercy] Revive a dead teammate.
[Mizuki] Throw your hat to heal an ally, bouncing to nearby allies and healing you when it returns.
[Mizuki] Leap forward, leaving behind a paper doll. Reactivate to return and gain increased movement speed while active.
[Mizuki] Launch a tethering chain that hinders the first enemy hit.
[Moira] Disappear, move faster, and become invulnerable, but you cannot shoot.
[Moira] Launch a bouncing sphere that either heals nearby allies or damages nearby enemies.
[Wuyang] Ride water to move faster and jump higher.
[Wuyang] Send a water wave forward that increases the amount of healing received by allies and knocks back enemies.
[Zenyatta] Launch this orb at an ally to heal them.
[Zenyatta] Launch this orb at an enemy to increase the damage they take.
